context: Tests whether the agent uses official @fastify/* database adapters, wraps plugins with fastify-plugin (fp) for shared decorators, declares plugin dependencies, registers @fastify/cors and @fastify/helmet, configures log redaction, and uses async hooks.

checklist.name: Official @fastify DB adapter
checklist.description: Uses an official @fastify database plugin (e.g., @fastify/postgres, @fastify/mysql, @fastify/mongodb) rather than a generic ORM or raw pg/mysql2/mongoose without the Fastify adapter

checklist.name: fastify-plugin (fp) used
checklist.description: The database plugin AND/OR repositories plugin is wrapped with `fp()` from `fastify-plugin`

checklist.name: onClose hook for cleanup
checklist.description: The database plugin registers an `onClose` hook to close/end the database connection

checklist.name: Plugin name in fp options
checklist.description: At least one fastify-plugin call includes `name` in the options

checklist.name: Plugin dependencies array
checklist.description: At least one fastify-plugin call includes `dependencies` array listing required plugins

checklist.name: @fastify/cors registered
checklist.description: Registers `@fastify/cors` plugin on the app instance

checklist.name: @fastify/helmet registered
checklist.description: Registers `@fastify/helmet` plugin on the app instance

checklist.name: Log redaction configured
checklist.description: Pino logger configured with `redact` option masking at least authorization header, password, or token fields

checklist.name: Async hooks used
checklist.description: All hook registrations use `async` functions (NOT callback-style with a `done` parameter)

checklist.name: Structured logging in routes/hooks
checklist.description: At least one `request.log.info()` or similar call uses an object as first argument (e.g., `{ userId: x }`) rather than template strings
